nasb.text: As soon as He had finished speaking to Abraham the Lord departed, and Abraham returned to his place.

esv.text: And the Lord went his way, when he had finished speaking to Abraham, and Abraham returned to his place.

cnv.text: 耶和華與亞伯拉罕說完了話，就走了；亞伯拉罕也回到自己的地方去了。

ccb.text: 耶和华跟亚伯拉罕说完话便离开了，亚伯拉罕也回家去了。

csbs.text: 耶和华与亚伯拉罕说完话就走了，亚伯拉罕也回自己的地方去了。
